name: clip_id
description: Clip being processed. Foreign key to clip_manifest.clip_id.

name: status
description: Outcome of this attempt: 'complete' | 'failed_transient' | 'failed_permanent'. No in-flight states. NOT enforced as an enum by BigQuery — validation lives in application code.

name: status_message
description: Free-form error or status detail. Typically populated on failure to capture the error reason. NULL on success.

name: attempted_at
description: Timestamp when this attempt was recorded. Auto-populated on insert via DEFAULT.
